titleStmt.title: SII 10.327: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 327. (A.R. No. 249 of 1905.) ON A PILLAR AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE DARK ROOM IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1171. (Saumya)

summary.p: States that Jāyasāni, wife of Chōḍebōya, son of Eñjali Chōḍebōya, gave 50 goats for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sakala sukavilōkastutyanityōrukīrtti
ripunṛpagalalōladraktasiktāsidhāraḥ .
Abhava dabhavapādavyaktabhaktiḥ pra siddha
trijagati velanāṁṭi kṣmāvibhu rggōṁkgabhūpaḥ .
tasmādaśēṣadharaṇībharaṇaikadakṣō tsa
rvvadhikārapadavīṁ labhatēsma bhaktyā .
Āsī dasau sukṛti reṁjalibōyuṇāṁka
padmāsanasya caraṇōdbhavavaṁśajātaḥ .
śrīmā nabhū dakhilayācakakhēcarēṁdra
stasyātmajō nijakulārnnavapūrnnacaṁdraḥ .
rājēṁdracōḍanṛpakāryyavidhā vataṁdraḥ
śrī bōyucōḍirativaibhavanirji tēṁdraḥ .
tasmā dajāyata suta ssitakīrttikāṁtta
ssaṁkraṁdanādhipajagadviditō jayaṁttaḥ .
cōḍāhvaya ssamadaśātravajivitāṁttō

yō tanā
na padakhaṁḍakhaṁḍa manēkadīpān . yō
tārisugṛhādikamagajēbhya nsurakṣitā
svajanatā bhuvi tasya patnī . śaṁbhō ru maiva
divijādhipatē śśa cīva viṣṇōra maiva hi
magō rapi rōhiṇīva . Asti praśasta
caritā bhuvi jāyamāṁbā pa
tyurgguṇaikanilayasya sadānukūlā .
śaśimuniśivamitē śakanṛpaśaradi tri
purāṁttakāya dēvāya . sādā da
khaṁḍadīpaṁ yātinemakara mākalpaṁ .
svasti śakavarṣaṁbulu 1171 Agu nēṁṭi
saumyasaṁvatsaramu Uttarāyaṇasaṁ
krāṁttinimittamuna svasti śrīmatu Eṁja
licōḍe bōyinikoḍuku cōḍe bōyini
peṁḍlamu jāyasāni tanapenimiṭiki dha
rmmuvugānu śrī tripurāṁttaka śrīma
hādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpamuna kicci
na mēṁkalu Eṁbhayi 50 vīniṁ jēkoni
nannebōyuṁḍu nityamāneṁḍu neyi
tanaputrānupautrikamu naḍapuvāṁḍu .
tripurāṁttakamu niṁḍu ḍamōju kaṁbhamu
Digital edition of SII 10.327 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
